name: hud_ui_main_menu_dialog_constructor
description: HudUiMainMenuDialog::Constructor initializes the HUD background, installs main-menu button ftables, selects frontend/in-game menu routes, and refreshes load/save availability.
known_limits: VC5SP3 11.00.7022 /O2 /Ob1 /GX /Zp4 COFF byte compare fails with 559 unmasked mismatches after masking 320 relocation bytes; Binary Ninja body is 891 bytes and the VC object body is 784 bytes with 1 trailing VC NOP trimmed.

Reviewed drift is dominated by the retail VC EH registration/state frame around the base and eight HudUiZrdWidget member constructors plus register scheduling around repeated BindWidgetByName calls. The in-game MAINMENU3/MAINMENU1 selection is now spelled as explicit source branches and the VC listing emits separate LoadFromZrd calls for those sections, matching the retail branch shape.

The native smoke covers frontend construction, custom dialog/button ftable installation, HUD background initialization inherited from HudUiBackground::Constructor, in-game lifecycle 4 route state, and blocked save/load refresh behavior.
